zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick於1254年4月11日出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡里克時，她的父親Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick52歲，母親Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick49歲。她於1271年與Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale在蘇格蘭艾斯爾騰恩貝利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她於1256年被列為countess of carrick。她去世於1292年11月9日在蘇格蘭艾斯爾卡里克享年38歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭恩布利亞阿比托。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick于1254年4月11日出生在苏格兰艾斯爾卡里克时，她的父亲Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick52岁，母亲Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick49岁。她于1271年与Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale在苏格兰艾斯爾騰恩貝利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她于1256年被列为countess of carrick。她去世于1292年11月9日在苏格兰艾斯爾卡里克享年38岁，埋葬在英国英格兰恩布利亞阿比托。

nameMeanings.name: Carrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish (Lanarkshire and northern England): habitational name from Carrick, a steep and rocky district in Ayrshire, named in Old Welsh with carreg ‘rock’, borrowed into Gaelic as carraig.

History: The earliest bearers of the Scottish Carrick surname (see 1 above) were descendants of the 12th-century lords of Galloway who became earls of Carrick in the early 13th century. The earldom passed by marriage to the   Bruce   family in later in the 13th century and then to the crown with the succession of Robert Bruce, earl of Carrick, to the throne in 1306. Illegitimate descendants of the earliest earls, themselves noblemen, continued to use the Carrick surname.

variants.name: McCarrick
meanings: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Con Charraige ‘son of Cú Charraige’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the rock’.
Anglicized form of Mac Con Chathrach ‘son of Cú Chathrach’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the fort’.

variants.name: Corrick
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of Carrick or Carrack, a habitational name probably from Castle Carrock (Cumbria), which is earlier recorded as Castel Carok. The placename derives from British castello- ‘castle, camp’ (a borrowing from Latin castellum ‘fort’) + a word related to Welsh caerog ‘fortified’.

variants.name: Karrick
meanings: Possibly also a shortened and altered form of Irish   McCarrick  . Compare   Carrick   2.
Americanized form of German Karrich: metonymic occupational name for a carter or cartwright, from Middle High German karrech ‘cart’, from Latin carruca. The surname Karrick is very rare in Germany.

nameMeanings.name: Marjorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick was born on 11 April 1254, in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, her father, Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick, was 52 and her mother, Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick, was 49. She married Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale in 1271, in Turnberry, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 8 daughters. In 1256, her occupation is listed as countess of carrick. She died on 9 November 1292, in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, at the age of 38, and was buried in Abbeytown, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick est née le 11 avril 1254, à Carrick, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick, avait 52 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick, avait 49 ans. Elle a épousé Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale en 1271, à Turnberry, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 8 filles. En 1256, la profession de sa indiquée est countess of carrick. Elle est décédée le 9 novembre 1292, à Carrick, Ayrshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 38 ans, et a été enterrée à Abbeytown, Cumbria, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick am 11. April 1254 in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick 52 und ihre Mutter Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick 49. Sie hat 1271 in Turnberry, Ayrshire, Scotland Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 8 Töchter. 1256 ist ihr Beruf als countess of carrick aufgeführt. Sie starb am 9. November 1292 im Alter von 38 Jahren in Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland und wurde in Abbeytown, Cumbria, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick è nata il il 11 aprile 1254 nel Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, sua padre, Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick, aveva 52 anni e sua madre, Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick, aveva 49 anni. Lei sposato Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale nel 1271, nel Turnberry, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 8 figlie. Nel 1256, la sua occupazione è indicata come countess of carrick. Morì il 9 novembre 1292, nel Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, all'età di 38 anni, e fu sepolta a Abbeytown, Cumbria, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrickが1254年4月11日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアカーリックで生まれた時，父Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrickは52歳，母Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrickは49歳であった。1271年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアターンバーリーでRobert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。1256年，職業はcountess of carrickと記録されている。彼女は1292年11月9日にスコットランドエイルシュアイアカーリックで38歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスクウンブリアアベイトウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick(이)가 1254년 4월 11일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 카릭에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick(은)는 52세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick(은)는 49세였다. 그녀는 1271년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 터른베리에서 Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 1256년, 그녀의 직업은 countess of carrick이었다. 그녀는 1292년 11월 9일 스컷랜드 에이르실르 카릭에서 38세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 쿠브리아 애브브이타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick nasceu em 11 de abril de 1254, em Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick, tinha 52 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick, tinha 49 anos. Ela casou-se com Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale em 1271, em Turnberry, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 8 filhas. Em 1256, sua profissão aparece como countess of carrick. Ela faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1292, em Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, com 38 anos, e foi sepultada em Abbeytown, Cumbria, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick родилась 11 апреля 1254 г. в местности каррикк, аиршир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick было 52 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick, 49. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale в 1271 г. в местности турнбирри, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 8 дочерей. В 1256 году она работала по профессии countess of carrick. Она умерла 9 ноября 1292 г. в местности каррикк, аиршир, Шотландия в возрасте 38 лет и была похоронена в местности эббитоун, кумбря, Англия, Великобритания.

es.Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United: Dumfries and Galloway, Escocia, Reino Unido

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Marjorie de Carrick 3rd Countess of Carrick nació el 11 de abril de 1254, en Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Niall de Carrick 2nd Earl of Carrick, tenía 52 años y su mamá, Margaret Stewart Countess of Carrick, tenía 49 años. Se casó con Robert de Brus 6th Lord of Annandale en 1271, en Turnberry, Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 8 hijas. En 1256, su ocupación registrada era countess of carrick. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1292, en Carrick, Ayrshire, Scotland, a la edad de 38 años, y fue sepultada en Abbeytown, Cumbria, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
